calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2020 Continued To Nov-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lars David Rowe, an individual also known as Lars D. Rowe.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Mark M. Scott, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Orion First Financial L.L.C, a Washington limited liability company.
Lorren Dalesky, Collection Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Scott and Dalesky appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Lars David Rowe, an individual also known as Lars D. Rowe.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Equipment Finance Agreements was filed on September 6, 2019, and personally served on defendant Lars David Rowe, an individual also known as Lars D. Rowe, on October 23, 2019.
Default as to defendant Lars David Rowe, an individual also known as Lars D. Rowe, was entered on November 14, 2019.
Plaintiff's Memorandum of Costs was filed December 31, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 31, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 24, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Orion First Financial L.L.C, a Washington limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Lars David Rowe, an individual also known as Lars D. Rowe, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $87,806.61.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $507.00.

Total - $91,138.61.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
